Stella Nova

from ore to empire.

Mine iron and titanium from asteroids. Smelt ore into ingots. Press ingots into steel. Bolt modules onto a station that grows however you design it. Your citizens will form friendships, hold grudges, and run the foundries while you're not looking.

SYS // CrewCommand

Command your crews

Assign citizens to mine, collect, construct, or harvest. They'll find the nearest asteroid, dock at the right station, and figure out the route themselves. But they also get tired, take breaks to socialize, and form opinions about who they want to work with — and who they don't.

12 Work StatesRelationshipsAutonomous AI
SYS // ResourcesExtraction

Gather everything

Ten raw ores — iron, copper, titanium, uranium, rare earth — scattered across asteroids with real spawn rarities. Your miners drill the rock. Crawlers haul the chunks to a space elevator. The elevator lifts them to orbit. Your collectors grab what floats free. Nothing spawns in your inventory — you earn it.

10 Ore TypesSpace ElevatorsFog of War

Station at Scale
Citizen Relationships
Orbital Planning
SYS // StationConstruction

Design your station

Place modules on a crossword-puzzle grid that expands in every direction. Crew quarters go inside walls. Docking bays face outward. Enclose empty cells to create storage bays that hold 64 units each. Foundries sit between bays as directional membranes — ore goes in one side, alloy comes out the other.

Grid ConstructionEnclosed Storage10+ Presets
SYS // IndustryProduction

Manufacture at scale

Smelt iron ore into ingots. Combine ingots with carbon to forge steel. Press steel and titanium alloy into reactor cores and shield emitters. Four production tiers, 40+ recipes, and your citizens operate the foundries — hauling fuel, feeding inputs, collecting outputs. Set a foundry to run indefinitely and it will, as long as someone keeps it fed.

4-Tier Crafting40+ RecipesCitizen-Operated
Built with Rust· Custom Engine· N-Body Physics· Local AI Narrator
